cards.back: A linear approach to software development that involves phases such as requirements, design, implementation, and testing
An iterative approach to software development that emphasizes flexibility, collaboration, and continuous improvement
A specific implementation of the Agile Model that emphasizes sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and sprint reviews
A comprehensive, iterative approach to software development that emphasizes discipline, governance, and continuous improvement
Software components that can be easily modified, extended, or reused in other projects, reducing development time and improving quality
